gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

At the entrance, event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards.

Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms are stacking glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.
Event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact.

Furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms are stacking glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and consulting firms are stacking glossy case study booklets on high tables.

Furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and consulting firms are stacking glossy case study booklets on high tables, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos. Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.
At the entrance, event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards, and career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact.
Furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and consulting firms are stacking glossy case study booklets on high tables.
Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.
Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.
Additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms are stacking glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards at the entrance, and students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

Furthermore, career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, consulting firms are stacking glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; at the entrance, event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards, and career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact.

Additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while consulting firms are stacking glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

At the entrance, event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact, while consulting firms are stacking glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; at the entrance, event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards, and career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and consulting firms are stacking glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos.
